title: Potion Cooldown
description: Adds a configurable cooldown to Potions
body:
![Potion Cooldown](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/56H7dkkl/images/983af8dc72dadbb3133c936f61cea13697c4ad75.webp)

## Description
Potion Cooldown is a lightweight mod that adds a configurable global cooldown to all potions, including drinkable, splash, and lingering types. The cooldown duration is fully configurable, and the mod enforces the cooldown visually using the vanilla cooldown bar.

## Note
This is meant to be used with a potion stacking mod such as [Potion Stacks](https://modrinth.com/mod/potion-stacks) for an RPG like feeling.

## Features
- Configurable cooldown for all potion types (drinkable, splash, lingering)
- Cooldown duration for normal and throwable potions can be set separately in the config file, with an option to sync or separate their cooldowns
- Cooldown is visually displayed using the vanilla cooldown bar
- Works with modded potions
- No new items or blocks

## Compatibility
- Compatible with most mods that add new potions
- Only required server side, but best results if installed on both client and server (so that the client sees the cooldown bar)
